title: regelia sarmentosa
intro: Regelia sarmentosa, also known as Green Bung or Green Bung Bush, is a flowering shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Regelia sarmentosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Regelia sarmentosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
